2026-03-30ISEDBoards of Trade ActOrder Approving the Change of boundary of the Chambre de commerce et d'Industrie Vallée-du-Richelieu, in QuebecOrder approving the application by the Chambre de commerce et d'Industrie Vallée-du-Richelieu, in Quebec, to change the boundaries of its district from Saint-Antoine-sur-Richelieu, Saint-Marc-sur-Richelieu, Saint-Denis-sur-Richelieu, Saint-Charles-sur-Richelieu, Saint-Mathieu-de-Beloeil, Beloeil, Mont-Saint-Hilaire, Sainte-Madeleine, Sainte-Marie-Madeleine, McMasterville, Otterburn Park, Saint-Jean-Baptiste, Saint-Mathias-sur-Richelieu, Carignan, Chambly, Richelieu, Marieville, Rougemont, Saint-Césaire, Sainte-Angèle-de-Monnoir, Saint-Paul-d’Abbotsford and Ange-Gardien to Saint-Antoine-sur-Richelieu, Saint-Marc-sur-Richelieu, Saint-Denis-sur-Richelieu, Saint-Charles-sur-Richelieu, Saint-Mathieu-de-Beloeil, Beloeil, Mont-Saint-Hilaire, Sainte-Madeleine, Sainte-Marie-Madeleine, McMasterville, Otterburn Park, Saint-Jean-Baptiste, Saint-Mathias-sur-Richelieu, Carignan, Chambly, Richelieu, Marieville, Rougemont, Saint-Césaire, Sainte-Angèle-de-Monnoir, Saint-Paul-d’Abbotsford, Ange-Gardien and Saint-Basile-le-Grand.N/A
